name: Prescription / Veterinary Diet
description: Prescription diets are clinically formulated to manage specific medical conditions including kidney disease, bladder stones, liver disease, gastrointestinal disorders, diabetes, and food allergies. Available only through a veterinarian.
suitable_for: dogs with urinary tract issues or bladder stones
dogs with pancreatitis or liver disease
dogs with IBD or severe food allergies
benefits: Clinically proven to support management of specific conditions
Precisely formulated nutrient profiles for therapeutic use
Backed by veterinary research and trials
Can significantly improve quality and length of life
risks: More expensive than standard commercial diets
Dogs may refuse the food due to taste restrictions
Not suitable for healthy dogs without a diagnosis
